name: Grupo Minsa, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Grupo Minsa, S.A.B. de C.V. produces, distributes, and sells nixtamalized cornmeal under the MINSAA brand name in Mexico. The company sells packaged corn and corn flour to mills and small and industrial producers. Its products are used for the production of tortillas and other related products. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Tlalnepantla de Baz, Mexico. Grupo Minsa, S.A.B. de C.V. is a subsidiary of Promotora Empresarial de Occidente SA de CV.
